mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.deleted = 0 AND p.permission_code IS NOT NULL

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, d.dept_name, pu.real_name as parent_name, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user pu ON u.parent_id = pu.id AND pu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, d.dept_name, pu.real_name as parent_name, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user pu ON u.parent_id = pu.id AND pu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, d.dept_name, pu.real_name as parent_name, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user pu ON u.parent_id = pu.id AND pu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.parent_id = #{parentId} AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, d.dept_name, pu.real_name as parent_name, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user pu ON u.parent_id = pu.id AND pu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.dept_id = #{deptId} AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, d.dept_name, pu.real_name as parent_name, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user pu ON u.parent_id = pu.id AND pu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = (SELECT parent_id FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0) AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, d.dept_name, pu.real_name as parent_name, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user pu ON u.parent_id = pu.id AND pu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.parent_id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.status, u.dept_id, u.parent_id, u.position, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.deleted, d.dept_name, pu.real_name as parent_name, r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user pu ON u.parent_id = pu.id AND pu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.parent_id IS NULL OR u.parent_id = 0 AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
